content.en:
"Any Ultimate System represents the quota of an Ultimate Realm Master, so if you have a variety of Ultimate Systems, and each of them has been cultivated to the extreme, such an Ultimate Realm Lord will inevitably be even more powerful!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, this secret did not spread.

He could understand it, after all, if it was spread everywhere, it would be very unfriendly to those Ultimate Realm Lords, and it would be even more difficult for them to improve.

There are not many ultimate systems with real potential, in fact, many of them are very incomplete, and unless you improve them, you can't break through to the ultimate realm master.

Therefore, those Ultimate Realm Masters didn't want those perfect Ultimate Systems to be brought to the end by other Nine Realm peak powerhouses, which would lead to their own inability to reach the end.

It is estimated that any Ultimate System can only give birth to one Ultimate Realm Master, and they are all competitors with each other.

"The Abyssal Star System should only be able to give birth to one Ultimate Realm Master. However, the human race can still use the Abyss Star System to cultivate to the peak of the Nine Realms, even if they can't use the Abyss Star System to cultivate to the Ultimate Realm Master, they still have hope to cultivate other Ultimate Systems in the future and rely on other Ultimate Systems to break through. "

Knowing the true mystery of the Abyssal Star System and the Ultimate System, he was very excited in his heart, and continued to comprehend the main body of the Abyssal Star to improve his Abyss Star System, as well as try to comprehend the Ultimate Rules of the Abyssal Star.

However.

He could only comprehend tens of millions of Domain Yuan years again, and it was undoubtedly too difficult to comprehend the Extreme Rules of the Yuan Star in such a short period of time.

However, he didn't expect to be able to comprehend the Extreme Rule of the Abyss now, as long as he went further.

Perhaps, he will first comprehend the ultimate dimensional rules of the Dimensional Sea, and after waiting for the "Four Eighty Zero" of the long years, he will have the hope of comprehending the ultimate rules of the Abyssal Star.

The orthodox ultimate system of the Sea of Dimensions should have more than one Ultimate Realm Master, which is also the reason why the multi-dimensional territory takes the orthodox path, but the orthodox path is too difficult to walk, and countless beings in the multi-dimensional territory have been born for a long time.

However, the Yuanxing system can make the human race rise rapidly, but there is only one ultimate realm master, and this is the trade-off.

The more difficult it is for the Ultimate Realm Master to go, while the Ultimate System with a low number of places can be quickly improved.

"No wonder the Void Heaven Palace will allow the peak powerhouses of the Nine Realms to descend on some dimensional worlds, the ultimate system of those dimensional heavens and earths is easy to cultivate, but the future potential is not good, and it is difficult to achieve the ultimate realm master, but there is no problem in mastering the ultimate dimensional killing moves. "

The more Ye Tian thought about it, the more he understood.

Unconsciously, he had already comprehended 100 million domain yuan years in the main body of the Yuanxing.

this day.

Ye Tian left from here.

......

Terran.

Ye Tian began to cultivate with the perfected Abyssal Star System, and his body began to frantically absorb a large amount of Abyssal Star power, and his body began to transform again.

His aura grew stronger and stronger, and his physical body became more and more terrifying.

After a long time, Ye Tian's body really completed a new round of transformation, reaching an extremely terrifying level.

Moreover, he himself also gave birth to the eighteen-star Abyss Star talent, which is the preferential treatment of the creator of the ultimate system!

"My current strength should have surpassed that of the Ancient Ape Star Monarch and the True Wu Realm Lord, unless they can break through again and comprehend the ultimate rules, they will definitely not be able to beat me!" Ye Tian said confidently.

Golden real sea.

Ye Tian's copy body here was also changed, and he continued to look for resources, and by the way, he also looked for the ultimate ancient monument.

In the past, he was not interested in the Ultimate Ancient Monument because of his lack of strength, but now he has the hope of snatching the Ultimate Ancient Monument.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian used his copying talent to explore, looking for the two ultimate creatures, and as long as he found them, he found the ultimate ancient monument.

He firmly believed that those two ultimate creatures should still be in the Golden True Sea, but they were hidden in a special place, so they were not easy to find.

Time passes.

After a long time, one day, when Ye Tian was exploring an area of the Golden True Sea, he suddenly felt that the copying talent was disturbed by a force, and he couldn't continue to investigate.

There are many such places, but none of them have ever found those two ultimate creatures, so there is no hope this time.

He just went over and looked at it, and found a cavern under the sea, the inside of which was so large that the power was constantly twisting, so that he could not perceive the inside.

Swish!

He went deep into the cavern, and soon two pairs of huge pupils stared at him from the void, and a terrifying aura permeated the surroundings.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian looked at the two extremely huge figures, which were the ultimate creatures like the two-headed giant snake.

Rumble!!!

They attacked Ye Tian and wanted to kill Ye Tian.

If it was Ye Tian in the past, he would definitely be easily killed by them, but now Ye Tian is not afraid of them.

"Abyssal Body!"

"Strange Domain!"

"Heavenly Pole!"

Ye Tian used an ultimate dimensional killing move, and with the rules of the highest dimension, he fought with them.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian is one against two, although he is suppressed, he will not be defeated for a while.

Immediately afterward, his other replica bodies arrived.

The second replica body!

The third replica body!

In a short time, six replica bodies arrived, five of which came to fight them, while the other replica body grabbed the Ultimate Ancient Monument and quickly left.

These two ultimate creatures wanted to chase but were intercepted, and they were unable to track Ye Tian at all.

Still, word of their battle spread, attracting the attention of other powerhouses.

......

"Put down the Ultimate Ancient Monument!"

A venerable powerhouse intercepted Ye Tian.

The Ultimate Ancient Monument can't be stored in the body, and there is no way to fit it with other spatial equipment, so it can only be carried by hand, so it will naturally be discovered.

But Ye Tian didn't panic.

"Get out of here!"

Ye Tian made a brazen move, and with just one move, he directly killed many existences at the peak of the Nine Realms.

And the attacks of the other Nine Realms peak powerhouses, even Ye Tian's body couldn't break the defense.

The strength of the Yuanxing system lies in the physical body, how can it be so easy to break the defense?

Rumble!!!

A giant ape crossed over, and it was the Ancient Ape True Monarch of the Holy Ape Mountain, he held a long stick to kill, and directly performed the ultimate dimensional killing move.

Outcome.

"Spear of the Abyss!"

Ye Tian responded with a fierce blow, directly shocking the Ancient Ape True Monarch, and causing the Ancient Ape True Monarch's bones to shatter, although he recovered in an instant, this meant that his combat power was not as good as Ye Tian.

Followed by.

Ye Tian's replica body arrived, and the combat power of each replica body was the same, completely deterring other powerhouses.

"Whoever comes, who dies!"

Ye Tian spoke.

At this time, the other strong people didn't dare to move, so they could only keep retreating and watch from a distance.

However, a strong man like Gu Ape Zhenjun was naturally unwilling to give up, and when a strong man with similar strength to him arrived, he attacked and killed again.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian fought hard to attack and kill, and killed him hard, coupled with Ye Tian's willingness to fight hard, he severely damaged many strong people such as Gu Ape Zhenjun, so that they did not dare to chase and kill again.

Ultimately.

Ye Tian still left with the Ultimate Ancient Monument.

And in this battle, Ye Tian is also completely famous.

......

Multidimensional territory.

Ye Tian came back with the Ultimate Ancient Monument, and directly brought it back to the Void Heaven Palace.

It's not that he doesn't want to bring back the Terrans, but once he brings them in, it will inevitably cause some trouble, and only the Void Heaven Palace can keep the Ultimate Ancient Monument.

Void Heaven Palace.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord and other Nine Realm peak existences all heard about Ye Tian's matter, and they were all a little incredulous.

They never expected that Ye Tian would be so powerful that even the True Wu Realm Lord had to admit that he was not Ye Tian's opponent.

It can be said that at the peak level of the Nine Realms, Ye Tian was already the most powerful one in the Void Heaven Palace, second only to the three Ultimate Realm Lords and Lord Duomi.

Lady Domi asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Okay, since that's the case, the Void Heaven Palace won't treat you badly. You yourself can always visit the Ultimate Ancient Monument, and the quota for entering the Void Heaven Palace can give some to your clansmen in the future. And, give you another 100 million contribution points. "

"What else do you want, you can ask now. "

Duo Mi said.

Ye Tian pondered for a while and said, "I want to cultivate on the side of the main body of the Abyss Star forever. "

Domi was silent and didn't immediately agree, because it wasn't something she could call the shots.

"I need to ask the Ultimate Realm Master!" Domi said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian waited quietly.

......

Deep in the Void Heaven Palace.

In an Ultimate Dimensional Void0.......

Domi came here and stood respectfully in front of a woman.

This woman is one of the three Ultimate Realm Masters of the Void Heaven Palace, Yinduo Extreme Venerable!

"Master!"

Duomi said respectfully.

"What's the matter?" asked Yinduo Jizun.

Duo Mi talked about Ye Tian's matter, and guessed: "Master, I see that Ye Tian Realm Lord has a strong and extremely strong aura, and it seems that he has surpassed the level of the ultimate master, and he may have walked on the ultimate system of Yuan Xing!"

"The Abyss Ultimate System, many old guys are also studying the Abyss Ultimate System, but it seems that the results are not very good, and there is no Ultimate Realm Lord who has mastered the Abyss Ultimate Path, it seems that the Ye Tian Realm Lord has hope. He wanted to cultivate on the side of the main body of the Abyssal Star, and he had to talk about this matter with the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable who guarded the Abyssal Star. "

Yinduo Jizun was about to go and talk to the giant axe Jizun.

After all, Ye Tian left the Ultimate Ancient Monument in the Void Heaven Palace, which was equivalent to making a great contribution, after all, the value of the Ultimate Ancient Monument was indeed very high.

If it weren't for the Ultimate Realm Lords' agreement, they weren't allowed to participate in the competition among the juniors, otherwise they would also interfere.

Swish!

Yinduo Jizun left the Void Heaven Palace and went to the main body of the Yuanxing.

Soon, she was here.

Wow!

The embodiment of the Great Axe Exaltation appears.

"Yinduo Jizun, rare guest, what are you doing here?" asked the Giant Axe Jizun.

"Giant Axe Extreme Venerable, I want to come here to cultivate in the Nine Realms of the Void Heaven Palace, not temporarily, but to cultivate here all the time, please give me a convenience!"

"Are you talking about the little guy at the peak of the Nine Realms who came last time?" The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable remembered Ye Tian, and couldn't help but smile and said, "It seems that that little guy wants to completely follow the path of the Abyssal Star Ultimate System, and wants to realize the rules of the Abyssal Star Ultimate." Hahahaha, I've been here for countless years, but I haven't realized it, and he still wants to realize it? You should know very well that my goal is also the Yuanxing system, so I have been guarding here for countless years, if that little guy has become the ultimate realm master by relying on the Yuanxing system, I won't be able to take this path. "

"Giant Axe Extreme Venerable, there are many ultimate systems, your success rate on this path is not high, why bother!" Yin Duo Extreme Venerable said.

The Giant Axe Extreme Zun shook his head, "Yinduo Extreme Venerable, even if the probability is not high, but I have spent so many years, I can't give up like this, right?"

However, at this moment, Yinduo Jizun waved his hand and projected a picture of Ye Tian's battle.

"This peak of the Nine Realms of our Void Heaven Palace has already surpassed you in the Yuanxing system, even if you don't come here to comprehend the main body of the Yuanxing, just to comprehend the Yuanxing fragment, his growth speed is also beyond you, you can't have any hope! Yinduo said with great dignity.

The giant axe Jizun looked at the picture of 4.7 and was really stimulated.

"This little guy has grown up so fast, and he has such attainments in the Yuanxing system, I am indeed inferior to him. The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable sighed, "Okay, I'm willing to give up, just let him come here and keep cultivating." However, let me say it first, your Void Heaven Palace has to compensate me with something. "

Wow!

A fragment was thrown by Yinduo Jizun to the Giant Axe Jizun.

The giant axe Jizun looked at this fragment and showed a smile: "The ultimate ancient meteorite fragment, a good thing, Yinduo Jizun's shot is really generous." "

"I'll let him come over, you won't be allowed to interfere with him. "

Yinduo Jizun left.

......

Void Heaven Palace.

Duomi came to see Ye Tian and told Ye Tian that he could go to the main body of Yuanxing to cultivate.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian rushed directly to the main body of Yuanxing.

Soon, he came here again, and also saw the middle-aged man, the embodiment of the giant axe.

"Little guy, you can cultivate here in the future, don't come to disturb me!"

Giant Axe Extreme Venerable said.

"Yes, Senpai!"

Ye Tian chose a good location, lived here, and then kept comprehending the main body of the Abyssal Star, as well as absorbing the power of the Abyssal Star to refine his body.

Time passed slowly.

Gradually, another 100 million yuan years passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had made greater progress in the Yuanxing system, and his copy body in the Void Heavenly Palace had been comprehending the Ultimate Ancient Monument, and now he had comprehended the Supreme Dimensional Rules to the three hundred and sixty-five realms, reaching the extreme realm of the Supreme Dimensional Rules.

One step further, that is to comprehend the ultimate rule!
